title: NewStructures
description: NewStructures - datapack that will add new structures to your world that will transform your world
body:
NewStructures datapack that will add new structures to your world with loot from the developer BomboNator, although the structures are not the coolest loot, but for beginners and some pros, such loot is very useful!

At the moment, the datapack contains the following structures:
- Tower (1 variation)
- House (1 variation)
- Statues (3 variations)
- Campfire zone (8 variations)
- Ancient ruin (3 variation)
